sections.paragraph:
Νάβαλ, ὁ (נָבָל; Ναβαλ LXX; Νάβαλος Joseph.) Nabal AcPl Ha 6, 22f (after 1 Kgm 25:3ff).

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Joseph Joseph This abbr. used when no specific texts are cited (s. Jos.); I a.d.—List 5

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 664
